items.title: What if we measure how good AI models are by what era of games it can one shot a single l…
items.title_zh: 如果我们通过人工智能模型在哪个游戏时代可以一次射击来衡量人工智能模型的好坏，结果会怎样呢？
items.description: What if we measure how good AI models are by what era of games it can one shot a single level for (or maybe build with 30 min of work): Atari NES SNES, Sega Genesis PlayStation, N64 PS2, Xbox, GameCube, Dreamcast Xbox 360, PS3, Wii PS4, Xb…
items.description_zh: 如果我们通过人工智能模型可以在哪个时代的游戏中完成一个关卡（或者可能需要 30 分钟的工作来构建）来衡量人工智能模型的好坏，结果会怎样：Atari NES SNES、Sega Genesis PlayStation、N64 PS2、Xbox、GameCube、Dreamcast Xbox 360、PS3、Wii PS4、Xb……

items.title: It's honestly impressive that GitHub kept the service up at all, given this kind of growt…
items.title_zh: 老实说，考虑到这种增长，GitHub 保持服务正常运行确实令人印象深刻……
items.description: It's honestly impressive that GitHub kept the service up at all, given this kind of growth. I predicted this years ago: Free services will become untenable with the advent of human-level bots. Worth exploring micro-payments: Even cents per…
items.description_zh: 老实说，考虑到这种增长，GitHub 保持服务正常运行确实令人印象深刻。我几年前就预测：随着人类水平机器人的出现，免费服务将变得站不住脚。值得探索的小额支付：甚至每美分......

items.title: The slides are actually really good.
items.description: The slides are actually really good. I used to pay people to make me slides and the process was always frustrating, but now I actually enjoy making them. https://t.co/vILNW8SC6u

items.title: Will keep saying this, but software jobs aren’t going away.
items.title_zh: 我会一直这么说，但软件工作不会消失。
items.description: Will keep saying this, but software jobs aren’t going away. Agents are the single biggest form of leverage for anyone technical in history. Probably has never been a better time to be technical in terms of being able to accomplish somethin…
items.description_zh: 我会一直这么说，但软件工作不会消失。对于历史上的技术人员来说，代理是最大的单一杠杆形式。就能够完成某件事而言，可能从来没有比现在更好的技术时机……

items.title_zh: 代理编码对于想要完成更多工作的软件开发人员来说是一个巨大的福音，...
items.description: Agentic coding is a huge boon for software developers that want to get far more done, great for IT people to build vastly more custom systems internally, great for domain experts that want to automate workflows or wire systems together, an…
items.description_zh: 代理编码对于想要完成更多工作的软件开发人员来说是一个巨大的福音，对于 IT 人员在内部构建更多自定义系统来说非常有用，对于想要自动化工作流程或将系统连接在一起的领域专家来说非常有用，...
